title: Puddings & Pastries
description: A small mod that adds a wide selection of cakes, pastries, and more!
body:
![The logo of Puddings & Pastries. The top text is a cake, and is covered in icing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/295719179509cba77c03ffa0996f1ee7145bbb99.png)

**This mod is in beta, and will recieve frequent updates. Anything in the mod currently is bound to change!**

Puddings & Pastries is a small bakery mod that adds new cakes, pies, and more!
##
